mapper.sql: select run_id, project_id, user_id, workflow_type, status, current_step, context_json, user_idea, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from novel_workflow_run
mapper.select: where project_id = #{projectId} order by run_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into novel_workflow_run ( project_id, user_id, workflow_type, status, current_step, context_json, user_idea, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{projectId}, #{userId}, #{workflowType}, #{status}, #{currentStep}, #{contextJson}, #{userIdea}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
